text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... my back stings each time I move. It's
drivin' me crazy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the pain, I can't even give my back a
proper scrub.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Seriously. It's just one thing after another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari One finds herself troubled by skin issues.
